visual-anti-patterns.notes: Purple-to-blue gradient covers entire landing hero; some secondary text (gallery metadata, category chips) appears below 16px

visual-child-friendly.notes: Playful tone with emojis, big CTAs, friendly AI buddy prompts, and calm 3D viewport; minor density in the builder's multi-panel layout

visual-consistency.notes: Logo and card radii are consistent but button colors drift across pages (orange/teal on landing, purple on gallery, orange/dark on builder)

visual-accessibility.notes: Good text-on-white contrast, visible selection ring on objects, text labels on most buttons; undo/redo toolbar icons lack labels, responsive behavior unverifiable from desktop shots
